runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.18) when sixth over 350m at Q Straight in a Grade 4. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from eight starts. Makes strong appeal.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on April 10 over 390m at Q Lakeside behind Art Of Deception beaten 6 lengths (22.09) in a Grade 5. Won at her only start from this draw. Go close again.

runners.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 366m (20.11) beating Eastly Bloom in Grade 5 on April 12. Deserved winner last time after finishing in the money two on end prior to that. Can make it two on the trot.
